title: Mowzie's Mobs: ReBroken Blade
description: Customize the Broken Blade item ID via the config file and enhance compatibility with Mowzie's Mobs.
body:
Mowzie's Mobs: The Broken Blade mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!

Features:

  1. Custom Broken Blade: Configure the Broken Blade item ID in the config file to replace the default Broken Blade.
  2. Enhanced Compatibility: Supports compatibility with the Mowzie's Mobs mod, ensuring the Broken Blade displays correctly.

Configuration Options:

  • WroughtnautBackSword: Configure the item ID for the Broken Blade, default is "minecraft:diamond_sword".
